thought.text: Let me try one more approach using a different weather API.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "curl -s \"https://api.weatherbit.io/v2.0/current/weather?key=your_api_key&city=Burbank,IL\" | jq '.data[0].temp'", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Get current temperature in Burbank, IL using Weatherbit API"}
